ja_html: <ruby><rb>夜中</rb><rt>よなか</rt></ruby>に いきなりさ いつ<ruby><rb>空</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>いてるのってライン

zh_text: 明明已經三年左右沒見面了 怎麼了呢
en_text: What's wrong? Even though I haven't seen you for about three years

ja_html: あの<ruby><rb>頃</rb><rt>ころ</rt></ruby> <ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>達</rb><rt>たち</rt></ruby>はさなんでもできる<ruby><rb>気</rb><rt>き</rt></ruby>がしてた
zh_text: 那時候我們總覺得什麼都做得到
en_text: Back then, we felt like we could do anything

ja_html: ふたりで<ruby><rb>海</rb><rt>うみ</rt></ruby>に<ruby><rb>行</rb><rt>い</rt></ruby>ってはたくさん<ruby><rb>写真</rb><rt>しゃしん</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>撮</rb><rt>と</rt></ruby>ったね
zh_text: 兩個人一起去海邊拍了很多照片呢
en_text: The two of us used to go to the beach and take so many photos, didn't we?

ja_html: でもみてよ<ruby><rb>今</rb><rt>いま</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>を クズになった<ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>を
zh_text: 但是看看現在的我 變成了廢物的我
en_text: But look at me now, look at me who has become a piece of trash

ja_html: <ruby><rb>人</rb><rt>ひと</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>傷</rb><rt>きず</rt></ruby>つけてまた<ruby><rb>泣</rb><rt>な</rt></ruby>かせても <ruby><rb>何</rb><rt>なに</rt></ruby>も<ruby><rb>感</rb><rt>かん</rt></ruby>じ<ruby><rb>取</rb><rt>と</rt></ruby>れなくてさ

en_text: Even if I hurt someone and make them cry again, I just can't feel anything anymore

en_text: It's not that I'm seeking you, but when you're by my side, I remember

en_text: It's all because of your Dolce & Gabbana perfume

ja_html: <ruby><rb>今更</rb><rt>いまさら</rt></ruby><ruby><rb>君</rb><rt>きみ</rt></ruby>に<ruby><rb>会</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>ってさ <ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>は<ruby><rb>何</rb><rt>なに</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>言</rb><rt>い</rt></ruby>ったらいい

en_text: What happened? Suddenly starting to hold a cigarette in your mouth like that
